titleStmt.title: SII 7.492: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 492. (A.R. No. 274-A of 1901). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīmanmakāma ṇṭalecura Irācātarāca Irācaparamecuraṉ bhāṣai kkutappuvarāyirakaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ pūruvadekṣa ṇapaccumauttara catu camuttirātipati catācivatevamakārāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa cakātta m 1 4 100 8 10 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa piñkalacaṅvaccarattu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu Ekāteciyum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa ṟokiṇi nakṣattiṟattiṉ naāḷ
perumāḷ tiruppernakarār tiruttaḷikaikku muṉṉāḷ kantāṭaikkoṉammaṅkaḷ Akkācciammaṉukku piṇaippaṭṭu muppatu poṉ vāṅki tiruppernakarār tiruviḷai Āṭṭamāṉa nilam mīḷukaiyil Anta nilattil pokam nāḷ Oṉṟukku tiruppernakarārtaḷikaikku patakku ṉāṉāḻi Amutupaṭi Amutuceyta(a)ruḷappaṇṇa Anta prasā tam Ittiruppatiyile kantāṭaikkoṉammaṅkaḷ maṭattile pattu śrīvaiyiṣṇa varkaḷ Amutuceytuvara Itukku
melveccattukku kaṉtāṭaikkoṉammaṉ paṇṇiṉa kaṭṭaḷai māsa m Oṉṟukku melveccattukku � 10This symbol stands for the word paṇam.Iṉta paṇam pattukku cilavu rāmāṉicakūṭattu � kaṟiyamutukku māsa m Oṉṟukku �1 miḷakukku �1 neyamutukku �1 Uppuamutu puḷiamutu � Ita (t)tayiramutukku �1 Erikarumpukku va� sva yampākikku �2 mam The inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 7.492 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
